title: Nandyal Heat Wave
lead: Nandyal is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.06. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Nandyal has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 20.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 38%, which can lead to heat-related illnesses. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 16.7 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
